title: Expert needed to help us with Integrations and Automations of Workflow and CRM
excerpt: Hello. We are a media company who have been using monday.com for over a year for many aspects of our business. We understand it quite well, and utilise automations and integrations to an intermediate level. We are lookin…

posts.author: Vicki_B (Vicki)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello. We are a media company who have been using monday.com for over a year for many aspects of our business. We understand it quite well, and utilise automations and integrations to an intermediate level. We are looking for someone to help us improve, streamline and automate some of our boards, and in particular our sales pipeline and CRM boards - we have good working knowledge, and can use automations and integrations etc, but haven’t got the time or advanced knowledge to take to the next level and improve efficiency.

I need to move forward quite quickly and am therefore looking to set up a TEAMS call with prospective project leaders Wednesday or Thursday this week (11&12th Oct) 3pm UK time - to discuss scope, timing, cost etc.

If this is of interest, please contact me

Thanks

posts.author: SegunMichael (Oluwasegun Michael Gbadegesin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Vicki,

Having read through your request which is such an amazing one, I find interest in working with you to enhance speed in your business.

Let’s hop on a call now for you to specifically tell me what you need and to discuss the job in detail.
You can reach me via michaelmcday77@gmail.com

I look forward to hearing from you.

Best wishes,
Oluwasegun Michael.

posts.author: Adam_Integration (Adam Reavill)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Vicky,
We’re a Global Gold Monday.Com partner and specialise in Workflow and Content, especially in the creative / media world.
Your scenario is not uncommon and as such we have some packages for reviewing, improving and training on Monday.com that are very popular. If you would like to learn more - please drop me a line?
adam.reavill@iointegration.com

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @Vicki_B and welcome to the monday.com community forums!

I would be very interested in connecting with you to introduce the team at CarbonWeb. We specialize in a component-by-component process that makes the work we do in monday.com flexible and creative. We have worked with numerous companies to not only develop custom solutions, but also organize and streamline existing processes through consultation.

Additionally, we recently launched the CarbonCRM Suite which is an end-to-end solution that creates a traditional funnel for cold prospects, new leads, and ongoing account management. You can learn a bit more through the monday Marketplace listing. Always happy to provide a demo!

If you want to schedule a time with me please do so here: Consultation - Ricky

I look forward to hearing from you and good luck as you continue to grow your environment!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co
